response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and deep technical breadth across languages and systems, including exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI or cloud-based AI systems, with minimal mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) development
Proven leadership in technical workshops, open-source projects, and cross-functional engineering
concerns: No explicit demonstration of 8+ years building production GenAI systems or RAG architectures
Lack of mention of vector databases, LLM metrics, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Education is a BS only; no advanced degree, and primary experience is in general software engineering, not AI-specific delivery
